{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Arelius founder
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]]
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Anything from the [[Arelius founder]] should predate the introduction of [[hunger madra]] to this [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
